author: y4rr
content: Follow-up sweep committed as single comprehensive commit 6daa2cce. 57 files, +2387/-373. cargo build --workspace PASS at HEAD. Branch is 13 commits ahead of origin/main. All 11 tracked follow-ups closed (#708, #709, #707, #696, #702, #692, #694, #703, #677, #687, #699). Plus #710, #711, #712, #713 umbrellas closed. Architect-mode running tally across full conversation series: 31 dispatches, 28 clean APPROVEs, 8 architect/audit-error catches surfaced. Next directions: continue §3 sweep on remaining 4 violator crates (ferrotorch-cubecl, ferrotorch-xpu, ferrotorch-jit silent-fallback, ferrotorch-distributed), or push to origin, or pause.
